### createContextHook()

Create a react context but more powerful. There are 2 modes - strict: true - There is no defaultValue, parent must provider the value. - strict: false - The behavior is the same as react context.

```typescript
export declare function createContextHook<Value>(contextName: string, options?: ({
    strict: true;
} | {
    strict: false;
    defaultValue: Value;
}) & {
    customizedContextMethods?: SetOptional<CustomizedContextMethods, 'useContextSelector'>;
}): {
    Provider: Context<Value>['Provider'];
    useContext(): Value;
    useContextSelector<Selected>(selector: (value: Value) => Selected): Selected;
};
```

#### createContextHook的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  contextName | string | the component name of context |
|  options | ({ strict: true; } \| { strict: false; defaultValue: Value; }) &amp; { customizedContextMethods?: SetOptional&lt;[CustomizedContextMethods](#customizedcontextmethods) , 'useContextSelector'&gt;; } | assign strict mode and customized context methods like <code>use-context-selector</code> |

<b>返回值:</b>

{ Provider: [Context](#context) &lt;Value&gt;['Provider']; useContext(): Value; useContextSelector&lt;Selected&gt;(selector: (value: Value) =&gt; Selected): Selected; }
